case_title: NICHOLAS WILLOUGHY VS. JOHN CHIANG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLOUGHBY, NICHOLAS

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLOUGHBY, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT CHIANG, JOHN CONTROLLER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-06-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-21-2007
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-22-2007. SEP-26-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-04-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION "UNCONDITIONAL" FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIANG, JOHN CONTROLLER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUN-12-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-26-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-17-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-01-2007.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-06-2007 CONTINUED TO AUG-17-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIANG, JOHN CONTROLLER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLOUGHBY, NICHOLAS SERVED MAY-25-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIANG, JOHN CONTROLLER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIANG, JOHN CONTROLLER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR DAVID MICHAEL BIGELEISEN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-02-2007 THROUGH JAN-31-2008.
